name: the-city-below
prompt: Wide shot through window glass. Futuristic city at night far below, military convoys on streets, broadcast towers with glowing frequencies. Urban lights, sense of crisis. The fracture visible from above. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: sera-at-window
prompt: Medium shot from behind-right. Brunette woman standing at window, profile visible against glass. City lights reflected in window. Her back partially to room. Silhouette against cool light. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: The Ascendancy is recalling by birth registry. Not request. Demand.

name: she-turns
prompt: Medium shot. Brunette woman at window turning to face room. City lights behind her, cool blue backlight. Her expression grave. Room visible behind camera. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: They want what we produce together. I'm in those files too.

name: wide-the-distance
prompt: Wide shot from side. Officers quarters interior. Dark-haired man at table LEFT, brunette woman at window RIGHT. Large visible distance between them. Warm amber room, cool window glow. Neither moving toward the other. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting
